entries.rawText: Feeling good and pretty focused. I have a lot to do, but it feels manageable.

entries.rawText: A little stressed and tired today. There are a few moving parts, and I am trying to keep up.

entries.rawText: Steady today. Not amazing, not bad. I am making progress one thing at a time.

entries.rawText: Much better. The work is coming together, and I feel more confident about the demo.

entries.rawText: Excited and proud. It has been a full week, but Mira is ready to show.
